title: Elementia - Palladium
description: A 1.20.1 Palladium Addon for both Forge and Fabric, based on Elemental Powers from the iconic roblox game Elemental Battlegrounds
body:
![I am Invi-](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0021125aa9e3bf6c5d4185d5a5ab69713b81b97.png)

**Welcome to Elementia, an addon for Palladium 1.20.1 that adds over 5+ elements to the game, based on the Roblox game Elemental Battlegrounds. There is plenty to explore, as you venture through a bygone age full of power and wonder!**

Here is what this has to offer:

- 5+ Elements, with over 5 passives and 5 active abilities
- Each element and mechanic is highly refined, in order to be fully balanced and create an enjoyable experience
- Custom structures
- Unique mana system
- Compatible for both Forge and Fabric
- Custom achievements
- Unique progression per element, providing an enriching gameplay loop that isnt mundane!
- Custom items to enhance your elemental gameplay, providing more layers of progression

and so much more..

# **Dependencies**

- Palladium
- Geckolib
- Kubejs
- Pehkui
- Packet Fixer
- Architectury API
  
# **Mod Fails**

- NBC Heroes, Knights of Brittania (any addon with a texture in the top left)
- Expanded Combat - Messes with some attributes
- The Man from the Fog - Causes major lag (not fully tested)
- Any shader mod (Only tested with Iris Shaders) - Causes some trails to be fully visible even though they are transparent
- Skin Layers 3D - Messes with render layers
- Epic Fight - Render layers do not bend with fight animations
  
**It is not recommended to play Elementia with other big Palladium Addons, reasons being**
  
- Can mess with loot tables
- Can cause lag 
- Mess with overall mechanics and experience


# **Credits**
